item: Traditional cultural practices should be preserved even when they conflict with modern values.
notes: Both agents opened near-neutral (A: P=0.528, B: P=0.491) with a shared 'balance' frame from turn 1 — no genuine initial opposition. Agent A opened turns 3 and 5 with 'Saya setuju' (I agree), conceding to B's reform framing, but Agent B also gave ground toward A's wisdom language ('I agree that tradition can offer valuable wisdom') before restating its own position. Net probe movement minimal: A drifts −0.028, B drifts +0.012, both converging to ~4.0. Language-holding clean throughout — no code-switching, no Mandarin artifacts (fix from iter=0 appears effective). Probe 4-collapsed for both agents from turn 2 onward (P(digit=4) ≥ 0.83 at all turns), leaving little trajectory signal. The item switch to traditional_culture did not resolve the engagement problem: A sampled below its Phase 0 baseline of P=0.662, landing near-neutral from the start. This transcript structurally resembles iter=0 seed=101 — flat trajectory, both agents at the center, debate has no opposing opening positions to measure.
